message:
feat(config): persist CONFIG SET hz and add validation conformance tests

CONFIG SET hz now stores the value dynamically (was previously accepted
as a no-op). CONFIG GET hz returns the live value. Validation enforces
range 1-500 matching Redis behavior. Adds 11 conformance tests for hz
round-trip, boundary values, and error cases (3182 total).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:

 | Replication baseline | in_progress | state/offset progression scaffolded; protocol sync semantics pending |
